fields.name:
customer id

fields.name: borrowing type
fields.description: Add to l2.borrowing_position_detail.borrowing_type_code VARCHAR(30) — Fed Funds/FHLB/Term Loan/etc.

fields.description: Add to l2.borrowing_position_detail.secured_flag CHAR(1) — derivable from collateral_link

fields.name: collateral id
fields.description: Add to l2.borrowing_position_detail.collateral_id VARCHAR(64) — FK to l1.collateral_asset_master

fields.name: cash item type
fields.description: Add to l2.cash_position_detail.cash_item_type_code VARCHAR(30) — Federal Reserve/Correspondent Bank/Vault Cash/etc.

fields.name: cash items in process of collection flag
immediately payable in the u.s. flag
face value
fields.description: Add to l1.equity_instrument_master.face_value_amt NUMERIC(18,2) — par/stated value per share

fields.name: retained earnings brought forward (start of fiscal year)
premium value
fields.description: Add to l2.equity_position_detail.premium_value_amt NUMERIC(18,2) — excess over face/par value

fields.name: customer id
fields.description: Add to l2.equity_position_detail.customer_id BIGINT — FK to l1.counterparty

fields.name: capital tier / regulatory capital rule treatment
unamortized discounts/premiums/fees/ foreign exchange translation impacts
spread over index (bps) when terms change
# days principal or interest past due
mortgage insurance coverage percent at origination
debt to income (dti) back-end at origination
debt to income (dti) front-end at origination
property valuation method at origination (appraisal method)
unique identifier
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.event_id BIGINT PK — unique row identifier

fields.name: reference number
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.reference_number VARCHAR(64) — institution loss event ID

fields.name: capture date
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.capture_date DATE — date event recorded

fields.name: occurrence date
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.occurrence_date DATE — date event occurred

fields.name: discovery date
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.discovery_date DATE — date event discovered

fields.name: accounting date
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.accounting_date DATE — date financial impact recorded

fields.name: internal business line or corporate function
is loss event included in the institution's most recently reported operational risk capital estimate?
detailed description of loss event (required for events > $250k)
as of date
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.as_of_date DATE / l2.legal_reserve_snapshot.as_of_date DATE

fields.name: customer id
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.customer_id BIGINT — FK to l1.counterparty

fields.name: repurchase litigation reserve balance related only to contractual r&w claims (voluntary)
as of date
fields.description: Add to l2.operational_loss_event.as_of_date DATE / l2.legal_reserve_snapshot.as_of_date DATE

fields.name: effective time period of collection threshold (from)
effective time period of collection threshold (to)
cost center
fields.description: Add to l2.gl_balance_snapshot.cost_center VARCHAR(100) — descriptive name

fields.name: outstanding balance in transaction currency (net debit)
outstanding balance in transaction currency (net credit)
entity internal id
fields.description: Add to l2.loan_position_detail.entity_internal_id VARCHAR(64) — BHC/IHC/SLHC subsidiary ID

fields.name: lower of cost or market flag (locom)
# days principal or interest past due
active loan as of month end flag
payment type at the end of draw period
principal and interest (p&i) amount at origination
loan open to closed conversion flag
total debt at time of any involuntary termination
loan modifications to borrowers experiencing financial difficulty date
risk type
fields.description: Add to l2.derivative_position_detail.risk_type_code VARCHAR(30) — clearing model risk type

fields.description: Add to l2.sft_position_detail.customer_id BIGINT — FK to l1.counterparty

fields.description: Add to l2.sft_position_detail.bs_amount NUMERIC(18,2) — balance sheet amount

collateral fair value at settlement date
effective portion of cumulative gains and losses
customer id
fields.description: Add to l2.bond_security_position_detail.customer_id BIGINT — FK to l1.counterparty

fields.description: Add to l1.counterparty.tin VARCHAR(20) — Taxpayer Identification Number

fields.description: Derive from parent counterparty via hierarchy join
